---
title: "PWHL Fantasy League - 2025/2026 Results"
author: "Alex & Noah"
format: 
  revealjs:
    incremental: true
brand: _brand.yml
background-image: static/slide_bg.png

---

```{r imports}
library(tidyverse)
library(gt)
library(bslib)
library(shiny)
library(bsicons)
library(ggimage)
library(rsvg)
library(janitor)

invisible(
  lapply(
    list.files(
      "./R",
      full.names = TRUE
    ),
    source
  )
)

pool <- 80
```

```{r "Get season dates and type"}
current_date <- today(
  tzone = "EST"
)


current_date = as.Date("2026-04-25")

seasons_dates_and_types <- get_seasons_dates_and_types()

season_dates_and_types <- seasons_dates_and_types["season_dates_and_types"][[1]]
season_schedules_by_id <- seasons_dates_and_types["season_schedules_by_id"][[1]]
season_schedules_by_year <- seasons_dates_and_types[
  "season_schedules_by_year"
][[1]]

days_for_current_date <- get_days_for_current_date(
  current_date,
  season_dates_and_types
)

next_game_day_date <- days_for_current_date$next_game_day_date |>
  as.character()
season_id <- days_for_current_date$season_id |>
  as.numeric()
season_id_for_schedule <- days_for_current_date$season_id_for_schedule |>
  as.numeric()
season_yr <- days_for_current_date$season_yr |>
  as.numeric()
game_type <- days_for_current_date$game_type |>
  as.character()
```

```{r "Get team data"}
team_data_frames <- get_all_teams(
  season_id,
  season_yr,
  game_type
)

team_logo_urls <- team_data_frames["team_logo_urls"][[1]]
teams <- team_data_frames["teams"][[1]]
team_codes <- team_data_frames["team_codes"][[1]]
all_teams <- team_data_frames["all_teams"][[1]]
```

```{r "Get schedule data"}
schedules <- get_schedule_info(
  season_id_for_schedule,
  season_schedules_by_id,
  team_codes,
  team_logo_urls,
  season_dates_and_types,
  next_game_day_date,
  current_date
)

schedule <- schedules["schedule"][[1]] |>
  mutate(
    game_date = game_date |> as.Date()
  )

schedule_to_date <- schedules["schedule_to_date"][[1]]
next_game_day_date <- schedules["next_game_day_date"][[1]]
todays_games <- schedules["todays_games"][[1]]
next_game_day <- schedules["next_game_day"][[1]]
```

```{r "Get Fantasy teams and standings"}
fantasy_teams_and_standings <- get_fantasy_teams_and_standings(
  all_teams,
  schedule_to_date,
  schedule,
  team_colours
)

team_images <- fantasy_teams_and_standings["team_images"][[1]]
team_colours <- fantasy_teams_and_standings["team_colours"][[1]]
team_rosters <- fantasy_teams_and_standings["team_rosters"][[1]]
roster_points_per_game <- fantasy_teams_and_standings[
  "roster_points_per_game"
][[1]]

fantasy_roster_points <- fantasy_teams_and_standings[
  "fantasy_roster_points"
][[1]] |>
  bind_rows(.id = "Team")

expanded_roster_stats <- fantasy_teams_and_standings[
  "expanded_roster_stats"
][[1]] |>
  compute_alt_awards()
```

## Categories

- 🛼 Most/least points per player ⛸️
- 🏒 Most/least points per category 🥅
- 😤 Most penalty minutes 🤬
- 💪 Most hits 🤼‍♀️
- 📈 Draft summary 📉
- 🔄️ Best/worst trades 🔄️
- 🏆 Overall winner 🏅

## 🛼 MVP ⛸️ {transition="zoom" transition-speed="slow"}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}
```{r}
#| dev: png
#| dev-args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
#| 
data <- fantasy_roster_points |>
  filter(player_id != -1, is.na(acquired), is.na(let_go)) |>
  arrange(desc(fantasy_points)) |>
  select(Team, first_name, last_name, fantasy_points) |>
  head(1)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = 0, y = 0),
    size = 150,
    colour = team_colours[[data$Team]]
  ) +
  geom_image(
    aes(
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      image = team_images[[data$Team]]
    ),
    size = .7
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )
```
:::

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}


```{r}
fantasy_roster_points |>
  filter(player_id != -1, is.na(acquired), is.na(let_go)) |>
  arrange(desc(fantasy_points)) |>
  select(Team, first_name, last_name, fantasy_points) |>
  head(3) |>
  gt() |>
  cols_merge(columns = c(first_name, last_name)) |>
  cols_label(
    first_name = "Player",
    fantasy_points = "Points"
  ) |>
  tab_options(
    table.background.color = "#F5F5F5",
    column_labels.background.color = "#2B2D42",
    table.font.size = px(16),
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table_body.hlines.color = "transparent",
    table_body.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.top.color = "transparent"
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "right", "left", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  opt_css(
    css = "

    table tr:nth-child(odd) {
      background-color: #e0dedeff;
    }"
  )
```

:::

:::

## 🛼 LVBSAP (less valuable but still appreciated player...) ⛸️ {transition="zoom" transition-speed="slow"}
::: {.columns}

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}
```{r}
#| dev: png
#| dev-args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
data <- fantasy_roster_points |>
  filter(player_id != -1, is.na(acquired), is.na(let_go)) |>
  arrange(fantasy_points) |>
  select(Team, first_name, last_name, fantasy_points) |>
  head(1)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = 0, y = 0),
    size = 150,
    colour = team_colours[[data$Team]]
  ) +
  geom_image(
    aes(
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      image = team_images[[data$Team]]
    ),
    size = 0.7
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )
```
::: 

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
fantasy_roster_points |>
  filter(player_id != -1, is.na(acquired), is.na(let_go)) |>
  arrange(fantasy_points) |>
  select(Team, first_name, last_name, fantasy_points) |>
  head(3) |>
  gt() |>
  cols_merge(columns = c(first_name, last_name)) |>
  cols_label(
    first_name = "Player",
    fantasy_points = "Points"
  ) |>
  tab_options(
    table.background.color = "#F5F5F5",
    column_labels.background.color = "#2B2D42",
    table.font.size = px(16),
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table_body.hlines.color = "transparent",
    table_body.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.top.color = "transparent"
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "right", "left", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  opt_css(
    css = "

    table tr:nth-child(odd) {
      background-color: #e0dedeff;
    }"
  )
```

:::

:::

## Team Equality Award {transition="zoom" transition-speed="slow"}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}
```{r}
#| dev: png
#| dev-args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
data <- fantasy_roster_points |>
  filter(player_id != -1, is.na(acquired), is.na(let_go)) |>
  arrange(fantasy_points) |>
  select(Team, first_name, last_name, fantasy_points) |>
  group_by(Team) |>
  summarize(Gini = DescTools::Gini(fantasy_points)) |>
  arrange(Gini) |>
  head(1)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = 0, y = 0),
    size = 150,
    colour = team_colours[[data$Team]]
  ) +
  geom_image(
    aes(
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      image = team_images[[data$Team]]
    ),
    size = 0.7
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )
```

:::

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
fantasy_roster_points |>
  filter(player_id != -1, is.na(acquired), is.na(let_go)) |>
  arrange(fantasy_points) |>
  select(Team, first_name, last_name, fantasy_points) |>
  group_by(Team) |>
  summarize(Gini = DescTools::Gini(fantasy_points)) |>
  arrange(Gini) |>
  head(3) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_options(
    table.background.color = "#F5F5F5",
    column_labels.background.color = "#2B2D42",
    table.font.size = px(16),
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table_body.hlines.color = "transparent",
    table_body.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.top.color = "transparent"
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "right", "left", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  opt_css(
    css = "

    table tr:nth-child(odd) {
      background-color: #e0dedeff;
    }"
  )
```

:::

:::

## Remembered the purpose of the game Award {transition="zoom" transition-speed="slow"}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
#| dev: png
#| dev-args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
data <- expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(desc(goals)) |>
  select(Team, goals) |>
  head(1)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = 0, y = 0),
    size = 150,
    colour = team_colours[[data$Team]]
  ) +
  geom_image(
    aes(
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      image = team_images[[data$Team]]
    ),
    size = 0.7
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )
```

:::

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(desc(goals)) |>
  select(Team, goals) |>
  head(3) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_options(
    table.background.color = "#F5F5F5",
    column_labels.background.color = "#2B2D42",
    table.font.size = px(16),
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table_body.hlines.color = "transparent",
    table_body.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.top.color = "transparent"
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "right", "left", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  opt_css(
    css = "

    table tr:nth-child(odd) {
      background-color: #e0dedeff;
    }"
  )
```

:::

:::

## Best Helper Award {transition="zoom" transition-speed="slow"}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
#| dev: png
#| dev-args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
data <- expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(desc(assists)) |>
  select(Team, assists) |>
  head(1)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = 0, y = 0),
    size = 150,
    colour = team_colours[[data$Team]]
  ) +
  geom_image(
    aes(
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      image = team_images[[data$Team]]
    ),
    size = 0.7
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )
```

:::

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(desc(assists)) |>
  select(Team, assists) |>
  head(3) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_options(
    table.background.color = "#F5F5F5",
    column_labels.background.color = "#2B2D42",
    table.font.size = px(16),
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table_body.hlines.color = "transparent",
    table_body.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.top.color = "transparent"
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "right", "left", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  opt_css(
    css = "

    table tr:nth-child(odd) {
      background-color: #e0dedeff;
    }"
  )
```

:::

:::

## Battle not the war Award {transition="zoom" transition-speed="slow"}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
#| dev: png
#| dev-args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
data <- expanded_roster_stats |>
  mutate(faceoff_pct = faceoff_wins / faceoff_attempts) |>
  arrange(desc(faceoff_pct)) |>
  select(Team, faceoff_pct) |>
  head(1)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = 0, y = 0),
    size = 150,
    colour = team_colours[[data$Team]]
  ) +
  geom_image(
    aes(
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      image = team_images[[data$Team]]
    ),
    size = 0.7
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )
```

:::

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
expanded_roster_stats |>
  mutate(faceoff_pct = faceoff_wins / faceoff_attempts) |>
  arrange(desc(faceoff_pct)) |>
  select(Team, faceoff_pct) |>
  head(3) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_options(
    table.background.color = "#F5F5F5",
    column_labels.background.color = "#2B2D42",
    table.font.size = px(16),
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table_body.hlines.color = "transparent",
    table_body.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.top.color = "transparent"
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "right", "left", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  opt_css(
    css = "

    table tr:nth-child(odd) {
      background-color: #e0dedeff;
    }"
  )
```

:::

:::


## Tryer Award {transition="zoom" transition-speed="slow"}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
#| dev: png
#| dev-args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
data <- expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(desc(shots)) |>
  select(Team, shots) |>
  head(1)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = 0, y = 0),
    size = 150,
    colour = team_colours[[data$Team]]
  ) +
  geom_image(
    aes(
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      image = team_images[[data$Team]]
    ),
    size = 0.7
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )
```

:::

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}


```{r}
expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(desc(shots)) |>
  select(Team, shots) |>
  head(3) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_options(
    table.background.color = "#F5F5F5",
    column_labels.background.color = "#2B2D42",
    table.font.size = px(16),
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table_body.hlines.color = "transparent",
    table_body.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.top.color = "transparent"
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "right", "left", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  opt_css(
    css = "

    table tr:nth-child(odd) {
      background-color: #e0dedeff;
    }"
  )
```

:::

:::

## Can't miss if you don't shoot Award {transition="zoom" transition-speed="slow"}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
#| dev: png
#| dev-args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
data <- expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(shots) |>
  select(Team, shots) |>
  head(1)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = 0, y = 0),
    size = 150,
    colour = team_colours[[data$Team]]
  ) +
  geom_image(
    aes(
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      image = team_images[[data$Team]]
    ),
    size = 0.7
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )
```

:::

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}


```{r}
expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(shots) |>
  select(Team, shots) |>
  head(3) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_options(
    table.background.color = "#F5F5F5",
    column_labels.background.color = "#2B2D42",
    table.font.size = px(16),
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table_body.hlines.color = "transparent",
    table_body.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.top.color = "transparent"
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "right", "left", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  opt_css(
    css = "

    table tr:nth-child(odd) {
      background-color: #e0dedeff;
    }"
  )
```

:::

:::

## Benchwarmer Award {transition="zoom" transition-speed="slow"}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
#| dev: png
#| dev-args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
data <- expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(time_on_ice) |>
  select(Team, time_on_ice) |>
  head(1)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = 0, y = 0),
    size = 150,
    colour = team_colours[[data$Team]]
  ) +
  geom_image(
    aes(
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      image = team_images[[data$Team]]
    ),
    size = 0.7
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )
```

:::


::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(time_on_ice) |>
  select(Team, time_on_ice) |>
  head(3) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_options(
    table.background.color = "#F5F5F5",
    column_labels.background.color = "#2B2D42",
    table.font.size = px(16),
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table_body.hlines.color = "transparent",
    table_body.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.top.color = "transparent"
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "right", "left", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  opt_css(
    css = "

    table tr:nth-child(odd) {
      background-color: #e0dedeff;
    }"
  )
```

:::

:::

## Icewarmer Award {transition="zoom" transition-speed="slow"}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
#| dev: png
#| dev-args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
data <- expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(desc(time_on_ice)) |>
  select(Team, time_on_ice) |>
  head(1)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = 0, y = 0),
    size = 150,
    colour = team_colours[[data$Team]]
  ) +
  geom_image(
    aes(
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      image = team_images[[data$Team]]
    ),
    size = 0.7
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )
```

:::

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(desc(time_on_ice)) |>
  select(Team, time_on_ice) |>
  head(3) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_options(
    table.background.color = "#F5F5F5",
    column_labels.background.color = "#2B2D42",
    table.font.size = px(16),
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table_body.hlines.color = "transparent",
    table_body.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.top.color = "transparent"
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "right", "left", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  opt_css(
    css = "

    table tr:nth-child(odd) {
      background-color: #e0dedeff;
    }"
  )
```

:::

:::

## Remembered the other purpose of the game Award {transition="zoom" transition-speed="slow"}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
#| dev: png
#| dev-args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
data <- expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(desc(wins)) |>
  select(Team, wins) |>
  head(1)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = 0, y = 0),
    size = 150,
    colour = team_colours[[data$Team]]
  ) +
  geom_image(
    aes(
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      image = team_images[[data$Team]]
    ),
    size = 0.7
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )
```

:::

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(desc(wins)) |>
  select(Team, wins) |>
  head(3) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_options(
    table.background.color = "#F5F5F5",
    column_labels.background.color = "#2B2D42",
    table.font.size = px(16),
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table_body.hlines.color = "transparent",
    table_body.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.top.color = "transparent"
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "right", "left", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  opt_css(
    css = "

    table tr:nth-child(odd) {
      background-color: #e0dedeff;
    }"
  )
```

:::

:::

## It's not over til it's over Award {transition="zoom" transition-speed="slow"}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
#| dev: png
#| dev-args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
data <- expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(desc(ot_losses)) |>
  select(Team, ot_losses) |>
  head(1)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = 0, y = 0),
    size = 150,
    colour = team_colours[[data$Team]]
  ) +
  geom_image(
    aes(
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      image = team_images[[data$Team]]
    ),
    size = 0.7
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )
```

:::

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(desc(ot_losses)) |>
  select(Team, ot_losses) |>
  head(3) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_options(
    table.background.color = "#F5F5F5",
    column_labels.background.color = "#2B2D42",
    table.font.size = px(16),
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table_body.hlines.color = "transparent",
    table_body.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.top.color = "transparent"
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "right", "left", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  opt_css(
    css = "

    table tr:nth-child(odd) {
      background-color: #e0dedeff;
    }"
  )
```

:::

:::

## Biggest Loser {transition="zoom" transition-speed="slow"}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
#| dev: png
#| dev-args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
data <- expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(wins) |>
  select(Team, wins) |>
  head(1)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = 0, y = 0),
    size = 150,
    colour = team_colours[[data$Team]]
  ) +
  geom_image(
    aes(
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      image = team_images[[data$Team]]
    ),
    size = 0.7
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )
```

:::

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(wins) |>
  select(Team, wins) |>
  head(3) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_options(
    table.background.color = "#F5F5F5",
    column_labels.background.color = "#2B2D42",
    table.font.size = px(16),
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table_body.hlines.color = "transparent",
    table_body.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.top.color = "transparent"
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "right", "left", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  opt_css(
    css = "

    table tr:nth-child(odd) {
      background-color: #e0dedeff;
    }"
  )
```

:::

:::

## Team Quality Award {transition="zoom" transition-speed="slow"}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
#| dev: png
#| dev-args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
data <- expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(desc(plus_minus)) |>
  select(Team, plus_minus) |>
  head(1)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = 0, y = 0),
    size = 150,
    colour = team_colours[[data$Team]]
  ) +
  geom_image(
    aes(
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      image = team_images[[data$Team]]
    ),
    size = 0.7
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )
```

:::

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}


```{r}
expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(desc(plus_minus)) |>
  select(Team, plus_minus) |>
  head(3) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_options(
    table.background.color = "#F5F5F5",
    column_labels.background.color = "#2B2D42",
    table.font.size = px(16),
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table_body.hlines.color = "transparent",
    table_body.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.top.color = "transparent"
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "right", "left", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  opt_css(
    css = "

    table tr:nth-child(odd) {
      background-color: #e0dedeff;
    }"
  )
```

:::

:::


## Violence Award {transition="zoom" transition-speed="slow"}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
#| dev: png
#| dev-args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
data <- expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(desc(penalty_minutes)) |>
  select(Team, penalty_minutes) |>
  head(1)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = 0, y = 0),
    size = 150,
    colour = team_colours[[data$Team]]
  ) +
  geom_image(
    aes(
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      image = team_images[[data$Team]]
    ),
    size = 0.7
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )
```

:::

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(desc(penalty_minutes)) |>
  select(Team, penalty_minutes) |>
  head(3) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_options(
    table.background.color = "#F5F5F5",
    column_labels.background.color = "#2B2D42",
    table.font.size = px(16),
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table_body.hlines.color = "transparent",
    table_body.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.top.color = "transparent"
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "right", "left", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  opt_css(
    css = "

    table tr:nth-child(odd) {
      background-color: #e0dedeff;
    }"
  )
```

:::

:::

## Violence Lite Award {transition="zoom" transition-speed="slow"}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
#| dev: png
#| dev-args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
data <- expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(desc(hits)) |>
  select(Team, hits) |>
  head(1)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = 0, y = 0),
    size = 150,
    colour = team_colours[[data$Team]]
  ) +
  geom_image(
    aes(
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      image = team_images[[data$Team]]
    ),
    size = 0.7
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )
```
:::

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}


```{r}
expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(desc(hits)) |>
  select(Team, hits) |>
  head(3) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_options(
    table.background.color = "#F5F5F5",
    column_labels.background.color = "#2B2D42",
    table.font.size = px(16),
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table_body.hlines.color = "transparent",
    table_body.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.top.color = "transparent"
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "right", "left", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  opt_css(
    css = "

    table tr:nth-child(odd) {
      background-color: #e0dedeff;
    }"
  )
```

:::

:::


## Player-of-the-game Award {transition="zoom" transition-speed="slow"}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
#| dev: png
#| dev-args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
data <- expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(desc(game_count)) |>
  select(Team, game_count) |>
  head(1)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = 0, y = 0),
    size = 150,
    colour = team_colours[[data$Team]]
  ) +
  geom_image(
    aes(
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      image = team_images[[data$Team]]
    ),
    size = 0.7
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )
```

:::

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
expanded_roster_stats |>
  arrange(desc(game_count)) |>
  select(Team, game_count) |>
  head(3) |>
  gt() |>
  tab_options(
    table.background.color = "#F5F5F5",
    column_labels.background.color = "#2B2D42",
    table.font.size = px(16),
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table_body.hlines.color = "transparent",
    table_body.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.top.color = "transparent"
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "right", "left", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  opt_css(
    css = "

    table tr:nth-child(odd) {
      background-color: #e0dedeff;
    }"
  )
```
:::

:::


## 📈 Draft summary 📉

Hi


## 🔄️ Trades 🔄️

Hi


## 🏆 ...and the winner is... 🏅{transition="zoom" transition-speed="slow"}

::: {.columns}

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}
```{r}
#| dev: png
#| dev-args: !expr list(bg = "transparent")
#| 
data <- fantasy_roster_points |>
  filter(player_id == -1) |>
  arrange(desc(fantasy_points)) |>
  select(Team, first_name, last_name, fantasy_points) |>
  head(1)

ggplot() +
  geom_point(
    aes(x = 0, y = 0),
    size = 150,
    colour = team_colours[[data$Team]]
  ) +
  geom_image(
    aes(
      x = 0,
      y = 0,
      image = team_images[[data$Team]]
    ),
    size = 0.7
  ) +
  theme_void() +
  theme(
    panel.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    plot.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent", colour = NA),
    legend.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent"),
    legend.box.background = element_rect(fill = "transparent")
  )
```

:::

::: {.column .fragment .fade-right}

```{r}
fantasy_roster_points |>
  filter(player_id == -1) |>
  arrange(desc(fantasy_points)) |>
  select(Team, first_name, last_name, fantasy_points) |>
  head(3) |>
  gt() |>
  cols_merge(columns = c(first_name, last_name)) |>
  cols_label(
    first_name = "Player",
    fantasy_points = "Points"
  ) |>
  tab_options(
    table.background.color = "#F5F5F5",
    column_labels.background.color = "#2B2D42",
    table.font.size = px(16),
    table.border.top.color = "transparent",
    table.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    table_body.hlines.color = "transparent",
    table_body.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.bottom.color = "transparent",
    column_labels.border.top.color = "transparent"
  ) |>
  tab_style_body(
    style = cell_borders(
      sides = c("top", "right", "left", "bottom"),
      weight = px(0) # Remove row borders
    ),
    fn = function(x) {
      is.numeric(x) | is.character(x)
    }
  ) |>
  opt_css(
    css = "

    table tr:nth-child(odd) {
      background-color: #e0dedeff;
    }"
  )
```

:::

:::
